description: Style Notefabindia's natural, craft-based pieces reference the style of the contemporary using ethnic garments and fabric. This sari perfectly captures the traditional mood of the moment with its styling and colour patterning. Choose this sari to express your appreciation of traditional techniques and to support Indian craftspeople who are keeping these art forms alive.Product DetailsBlue mull printed sari with a black borderMaterial and CareCottonDry cleanSizeLength: 5.4 metres (approximate)
